svg.title: Git branch workflow: main, feature branches, pull requests, merge
svg.desc: Visual workflow showing how main branch serves as source of truth, feature branches branch off for work, pull requests provide review gates, and merges bring changes back to main.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens during a pull request?')
sendPrompt('What happens during a pull request?')

g.text: Main stays stable · Feature branches are isolated · PRs enforce review
